criteriaResults.evidence: agents/bober-postmortemer.md YAML tools:[Read,Bash,Grep,Glob] only. NO obs__ MCPs. NO Write/Edit. Line 33 explicitly states no obs__ tools. Iron Law @40-46. 7 Red Flags. 7 Rationalization rows.
Iron Law verbatim 'NO POSTMORTEM SECTION WITHOUT EVIDENCE FROM INCIDENT ARTIFACTS' @40-46 in agent + @17-22 in SKILL.md.
SKILL.md synthesis order @38-50 (9 artifacts), 5-Whys heuristic pseudocode @54-90, contributing factors from runbook-execution failures, action items from gaps. Template @92-157.

All required sections present in template @92-157: Title, Status, Severity, TL;DR, Timeline (table), Impact, Root Cause (5-Whys numbered), Contributing Factors, What Went Well, What Went Wrong, Action Items (Owner|Due TBD placeholders).

generatePostmortem(projectRoot, incidentId): Promise<PostmortemResult{path,content,redactionCount,shallowWarning,citationCount}>. Reads 8 artifact sources (incident.json, timeline.jsonl, observations.jsonl, changelog.jsonl, runbook-execution.jsonl, actions.jsonl, diagnoses/, resolution-evidence/). Deterministic programmatic synthesis. Test 1 verifies all required section headings. LOW NOTE: hypotheses.md documented in SKILL/agent but not yet read by impl — gap tracked.

timeline.ts @484-511 fire-and-forget IIFE on resolved when autoPostmortem !== false. Dynamic import. Post-completion atomic incident.json write with postmortemPath. schema.ts @276 default true; @296 optional incident on BoberConfigSchema. Test 5: status returns <500ms; postmortemPath set after await pmPromise. Test 6: autoPostmortem=false suppresses.

Test 2 asserts r.citationCount > 5 + spot-checks /(timeline\.jsonl#L\d+)/, /(diagnoses\/diagnosis-)/, '(incident.json)'. countCitations() @603-610. SKILL.md @159-170 + agent @117-126 document citation format table (4 styles).

src/cli/commands/postmortem.ts registerPostmortemCommand: parent 'postmortem' @26 + 'generate <id>' @31 + 'show <id>' @66 subcommands. Registered in src/cli/index.ts:262. ENOENT handlers with exitCode=1.
All 4 strategies exit 0. 1030 tests pass (+7 from 1023). Existing tests updated minimally with autoPostmortem:false (no behavior changes).

generatorFeedback.description: hypotheses.md documented as synthesis source #9 in SKILL.md and agent prompt but NOT read by generatePostmortem. 'Disproved:' lines should feed What Went Well; 'Open:' lines should feed Action Items. Tracked for follow-up.
Auto-trigger non-blocking test uses elapsed < 500ms timing proxy. Stronger structural check would assert postmortem.md NOT exist pre-await and DOES exist post-await.

summary: All 9 criteria pass on iter 1. Offline read-only postmortemer (no MCPs), full template, deterministic programmatic synthesis with citations (count > 5), redaction (AKIA test verifies fake API key NOT in output), fire-and-forget non-blocking auto-trigger preserves status-transition latency, autoPostmortem=false suppresses. 1030 tests, +7 from 1023. Two low-priority gaps (hypotheses.md not read; non-blocking test uses timing) tracked.
